they correctly identify the code as benign.\n   - No claims about vulnerabilities are made; the analysis is consistent.\n\n6. **Consistency of Scores**:\n   - The scores align well with the code content.\n   - No adjustments needed.\n\n---\n\n### Final Evaluation:\n\n- **Malware Score**: **0** — No malicious activity detected.\n- **Obfuscated Score**: **0** — Code is clear, minimal, and not obfuscated.\n- **Risk Score**: **0.1** — Slightly above zero due to source map comment, but practically negligible.\n\n### Additional Remarks:\n- The code is a standard transpiled module stub, with no security concerns.\n- The source map comment is typical and not indicative of malicious intent.\n- No further action required.\n\n**Summary**: The code is benign, with scores appropriately reflecting its harmless nature.",
